checked_paths: all audited dependency repos searched for the listed symbols
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No local audited repo handles ExecutorWentOffline logs to deactivate the executor keyed by indexed paymentAddress; the old/new offline event dispatch path is missing entirely.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-spc-verification/src/types.rs still defines ExecutorRegistry and deactivate_executor, but it is only an in-memory map and has no log-watching service.
ritual-tee-registry-reader reads TEEServiceRegistry storage via TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS; it does not decode ExecutorRegistry event logs.

ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal/crates/node/src/executor.rs syncs registry state from storage before execution but uses TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS and read_all_executors, not ExecutorRegistry event receipts.
ExecutorRegistry::deactivate_executor exists in ritual-spc-verification/src/types.rs, but searches found no ExecutorWentOffline dispatcher calling it.

notes: Confirmed by exact event-symbol searches across all audited local repos; the current local architecture reads registry storage instead of consuming ExecutorRegistry event logs.
rationale: The old ExecutorDeactivated(owner) handling is replaced with ExecutorWentOffline(address), and the handler extracts topics[1] as payment_address and passes it to registry.deactivate_executor. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: An ExecutorWentOffline event must deactivate the executor keyed by the indexed paymentAddress topic.
suggested_falsification_tests: After registering an executor by payment address, feed an ExecutorWentOffline log with that payment address in topics[1] and assert the registry marks that executor inactive; feed the old ExecutorDeactivated signature and assert it is ignored.
summary: Offline event deactivation by payment address is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: After registering an executor, emit ExecutorWentOffline and assert the current local code has no event path that deactivates it.
title: Offline events deactivate payment address
